variants.title: Filtrec WT703 Special Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec WT703. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the WT703 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Outer Diameter: 29.0 mm, Length: 165.0 mm, Thread: 3/4" BSP, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Flow Direction: OUT-IN
